Essen­tials
12 Pieces — Core Wardrobe

The
Weight
Of Light

The SS24 editorial explores a single obsession: the threshold where fabric becomes architecture, and architecture dissolves back into fabric. Shot across three continents, three cities, one intention.

Read the Story
Editorial — 001
Form follows void. The SS24 collection explores negative space as material itself.

More
Process — 002
Fabrication notes from our atelier in Osaka — three months of silence in development.

More
Story — 003
